targets.rawSql:
WITH undefined as (
SELECT
  IF ((client.Geo.City = "" OR client.Geo.City IS NULL), "undefined", client.Geo.City) as city,
  IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as country,
  IF ((client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt_intermediate.extended_ndt7_downloads`
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date)) 
  AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.ContinentCode, "${continent:regex}")
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
  AND (filter.IsComplete AND filter.IsProduction AND NOT filter.IsError AND NOT filter.IsOAM AND NOT filter.IsPlatformAnomaly
        AND NOT filter.IsSmall AND NOT filter.IsShort AND NOT filter.IsLong AND NOT filter._IsRFC1918)
)

SELECT
  COUNT(*)
FROM undefined
WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))

WITH undefined as (
SELECT
  IF ((client.Geo.City = "" OR client.Geo.City IS NULL), "undefined", client.Geo.City) as city,
  IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as country,
  IF ((client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN,
  a.MeanThroughputMbps as download
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt_intermediate.extended_ndt7_downloads`
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date)) 
  AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.ContinentCode, "${continent:regex}")
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
  AND (filter.IsComplete AND filter.IsProduction AND NOT filter.IsError AND NOT filter.IsOAM AND NOT filter.IsPlatformAnomaly
        AND NOT filter.IsSmall AND NOT filter.IsShort AND NOT filter.IsLong AND NOT filter._IsRFC1918)
)

SELECT
  APPROX_QUANTILES(undefined.download, 100)[OFFSET(${percentile})]
FROM undefined
WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))

WITH undefined as (
SELECT
  IF ((client.Geo.City = "" OR client.Geo.City IS NULL), "undefined", client.Geo.City) as city,
  IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as country,
  IF ((client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN,
  a.MeanThroughputMbps as upload
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt_intermediate.extended_ndt7_uploads`
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date)) 
  AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.ContinentCode, "${continent:regex}")
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
  AND (filter.IsComplete AND filter.IsProduction AND NOT filter.IsError AND NOT filter.IsOAM AND NOT filter.IsPlatformAnomaly
        AND NOT filter.IsSmall AND NOT filter.IsShort AND NOT filter.IsLong AND NOT filter._IsRFC1918)
)

SELECT
  APPROX_QUANTILES(undefined.upload, 100)[OFFSET(${percentile})]
FROM undefined
WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))

WITH undefined as (
SELECT
  IF ((client.Geo.City = "" OR client.Geo.City IS NULL), "undefined", client.Geo.City) as city,
  IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as country,
  IF ((client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN,
  a.TestTime as time
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt_intermediate.extended_ndt7_downloads`
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date)) 
  AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.ContinentCode, "${continent:regex}")
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
  AND (filter.IsComplete AND filter.IsProduction AND NOT filter.IsError AND NOT filter.IsOAM AND NOT filter.IsPlatformAnomaly
        AND NOT filter.IsSmall AND NOT filter.IsShort AND NOT filter.IsLong AND NOT filter._IsRFC1918)
)

SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(undefined.time, ${time_segment}) as time,
  COUNT(*) as value
FROM undefined
WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(undefined.clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))
GROUP by time
ORDER BY time

WITH undefined as (
SELECT
  IF ((client.Geo.City = "" OR client.Geo.City IS NULL), "undefined", client.Geo.City) as city,
  IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as country,
  IF ((client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN,
  a.TestTime as time,
  a.MeanThroughputMbps as download
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt_intermediate.extended_ndt7_downloads`
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date)) 
  AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.ContinentCode, "${continent:regex}")
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
  AND (filter.IsComplete AND filter.IsProduction AND NOT filter.IsError AND NOT filter.IsOAM AND NOT filter.IsPlatformAnomaly
        AND NOT filter.IsSmall AND NOT filter.IsShort AND NOT filter.IsLong AND NOT filter._IsRFC1918)
)

SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(undefined.time,  ${time_segment}) as time,
  APPROX_QUANTILES(undefined.download, 100)[OFFSET(${percentile})]
FROM undefined
WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(undefined.clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))
GROUP by time
ORDER BY time

WITH undefined as (
SELECT
  IF ((client.Geo.City = "" OR client.Geo.City IS NULL), "undefined", client.Geo.City) as city,
  IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as country,
  IF ((client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN,
  a.TestTime as time,
  a.MeanThroughputMbps as upload
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt_intermediate.extended_ndt7_uploads`
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date)) 
  AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.ContinentCode, "${continent:regex}")
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
  AND (filter.IsComplete AND filter.IsProduction AND NOT filter.IsError AND NOT filter.IsOAM AND NOT filter.IsPlatformAnomaly
        AND NOT filter.IsSmall AND NOT filter.IsShort AND NOT filter.IsLong AND NOT filter._IsRFC1918)
)

SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(undefined.time,  ${time_segment}) as time,
  APPROX_QUANTILES(undefined.upload, 100)[OFFSET(${percentile})]
FROM undefined
WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(undefined.clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))
GROUP by time
ORDER BY time

WITH clientASNs as (
SELECT   
  IF (( client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt.ndt7`
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date))
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
GROUP BY clientASN
ORDER by count DESC
LIMIT 5
),

undefined as (
SELECT
  IF ((client.Geo.City = "" OR client.Geo.City IS NULL), "undefined", client.Geo.City) as city,
  IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as country,
  IF (( client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN,
  a.TestTime as time,
  a.MeanThroughputMbps as download
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt_intermediate.extended_ndt7_downloads` 
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date)) 
  AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.ContinentCode, "${continent:regex}")
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
  AND (filter.IsComplete AND filter.IsProduction AND NOT filter.IsError AND NOT filter.IsOAM AND NOT filter.IsPlatformAnomaly
        AND NOT filter.IsSmall AND NOT filter.IsShort AND NOT filter.IsLong AND NOT filter._IsRFC1918)
)

SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(undefined.time,  ${time_segment}) as time,
  clientASNs.clientASN as clientASN,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM clientASNs INNER JOIN undefined on clientASNs.clientASN = undefined.clientASN 
WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(undefined.clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))
GROUP by time, clientASN
ORDER BY time

WITH clientASNs as (
SELECT   
  IF (( client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN,

FROM `measurement-lab.ndt.ndt7`

  $__timeFilter(TIMESTAMP(date)) 
  AND IF("${country}" = "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
GROUP BY clientASN
ORDER by count DESC
LIMIT 5
),

SELECT

WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(undefined.clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))
GROUP by time, clientASN
ORDER BY time

WITH clientASNs as (
SELECT   
  IF (( client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN,

GROUP BY clientASN
ORDER by count DESC
LIMIT 5
),

undefined as (
SELECT
  IF ((client.Geo.City = "" OR client.Geo.City IS NULL), "undefined", client.Geo.City) as city,
  IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as country,

SELECT

FROM clientASNs INNER JOIN undefined on clientASNs.clientASN = undefined.clientASN 
WHERE --REGEXP_CONTAINS(city, "${city:regex}")
  IF("${clientASN}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(undefined.clientASN, "${clientASN:regex}"))
GROUP by time, clientASN
ORDER BY time

query.rawSql:
SELECT ContinentCode 
FROM (
SELECT client.Geo.ContinentCode
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt.ndt7`
WHERE date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
AND client.Geo.ContinentCode IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ContinentCode
)

FROM (
SELECT   
IF ((client.Geo.CountryName = "" OR client.Geo.CountryName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Geo.CountryName, ".", "")) as CountryName
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt.ndt7`
WHERE date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
AND  REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.ContinentCode, "${continent:regex}")
GROUP BY CountryName
)

SELECT   
  IF (( client.Network.ASName = "" OR client.Network.ASName IS NULL), "undefined", REPLACE(client.Network.ASName, ".", "")) as clientASN
FROM `measurement-lab.ndt.ndt7`
WHERE  
date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
 AND IF("${country}"= "all", TRUE, REGEXP_CONTAINS(client.Geo.CountryName, "${country:regex}"))
GROUP BY clientASN
ORDER by clientASN
